basedOn: 6-year ICICI credit card analysis (FY 2020-21 to FY 2025-26)
optimizationTarget: Reduce discretionary spend by ~41% vs FY 2025-26 spike year
rules: Pay credit card bill in full before due date — zero EMI interest target
Amazon: batch orders once or twice a month only
Jewellery: max 1 purchase per year, compare making charges
Use health insurance for hospital bills where possible
Use no-cost EMI or pay upfront for purchases above ₹25,000

categories.name: Healthcare
categories.note: Hospital, pharmacy, check-ups. Lower than FY25-26 spike but keep buffer.

categories.name: Jewellery
categories.note: Max 1 purchase/year. Compare making charges across jewellers.

categories.name: Amazon
categories.note: Batch orders monthly. Set cart review before checkout.

categories.name: Retail / Fashion
categories.note: Clothing, silks, tailoring (PN Rao, Manyavar, etc.).

categories.name: Travel
categories.note: Flights, hotels, packages (IXIGO, Travel Troops). Plan 1 trip/year.

categories.name: Electronics / Apple
categories.note: Only when needed. Avoid EMI — use no-cost EMI if essential.

categories.name: Subscriptions
categories.note: Apple, SAE, streaming. Audit quarterly — cancel unused.

categories.name: Emergency / Misc
categories.note: Unplanned expenses. If unused, roll to savings.

categories.name: Big Purchase Fund
categories.note: Save monthly for planned large buys (furniture, bike service). Avoid surprise EMI.
